description: Partial pipes through a bogus filter → UnknownFilter error + closest-match suggestion

errors.hint: Filter `totally_made_up_filter` is not available in platformOS. Check for typos or use `lookup` (completions mode) at the filter position to see available filters.

warnings.message: This partial is not referenced by any other files
warnings.hint:
`app/views/partials/parity/unknown_filter.liquid` is an orphaned partial. No file in the project renders or includes it.

Two valid resolutions:
  • **Dead code** — delete the file. Use the `delete_file` fix if you're certain nothing renders it.
  • **Work in progress** — the caller hasn't been written yet. Either write the caller now (then re-validate, the warning clears), or pass `pending_files=["<caller-path>"]` to validate_code so the orphan is suppressed during the multi-file plan.

Renaming the file (e.g. via scaffold output) is the third common cause — re-run `project_map` to confirm callers point at the current name.

fixes.description: Delete `app/views/partials/parity/unknown_filter.liquid` — no other file in the project renders it. Re-run validate_code first if you're mid-feature; pass `pending_files=["app/views/partials/parity/unknown_filter.liquid"]` (or the caller's path) to suppress this warning while you write the caller.

Decide: (a) delete `app/views/partials/parity/unknown_filter.liquid` if it's dead, (b) write the calling page/partial if work is in progress, or (c) pass `pending_files=["<caller>"]` to validate_code while you scaffold the caller. Run `platformos_references` to confirm no rendering graph entry points at it.

Run `platformos_references` to confirm no rendering graph entry points at it.

domain_guide.rule: Partials receive ONLY explicitly passed variables — no outer scope leaks. Do NOT run {% graphql %} in rendering partials.

triggered_gotchas.message: Partials have isolated scope. Every variable used must be passed explicitly or assigned locally.
NEVER pass null for a typed parameter — use the matching empty value: '' for {string}, 0 for {number}, false for {boolean}, {} for {object}, [] for {array}.

result.next_step:
Fix every ERROR above.
Fix every BLOCKING WARNING above (OrphanedPartial). These break callers or drop functionality — they MUST be resolved before write.
2 proposed fix(es) available — apply them first.
Re-validate with validate_code (mode: "quick") after fixing.
MUST NOT write the file to disk until validation passes (must_fix_before_write: false).
